title: BIP 110 Fork Deadline Approaches With Zero Miner Support
dek: A deadline tied to Bitcoin's BIP 110 proposal is approaching with miner support reported at zero. Prominent figures including Michael Saylor and Adam Back have rebuffed the proposal, warning that a fork fight could pose a larger systemic risk than the spam it targets.
author: Crypto Cronkite
key_fact: Miner support for BIP 110 stands at zero as its fork deadline nears.
body: The deadline associated with Bitcoin's BIP 110 proposal is nearing, with reported miner support at zero.

Prominent figures, including Michael Saylor and Adam Back, have rebuffed the proposal. Some have argued that a fork fight itself represents a larger systemic risk than the spam BIP 110 is intended to address.
The dispute is a live consensus matter concerning the Bitcoin protocol.
